node.statement: APPROX A3 (Drop disorder, phonons, spin-orbit): (a) Disorder V_dis(r): essential for plateau WIDTH but not for gap MAGNITUDE — we compute gaps on clean system, model disorder phenomenologically via mobility mu. (b) Phonons: gap to acoustic phonons > FQHE gap at mK temperatures. (c) Spin-orbit: g*=-0.44 in GaAs, Zeeman ~0.3K/T — assume full spin polarization at FQHE fields. NEGLECTED but ACKNOWLEDGED. [P11-Girvin Sec 1.1.3]
